summary: Iteration 45: Email Change Feature and Password Change Bug Fix - Backend 100% PASSED (10/10 tests). Frontend code verified through code review. All email change API scenarios tested successfully. Password change bug fix confirmed working.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot automate login in React Native Web - TouchableOpacity button clicks not registering via Playwright
integration_issues.note: Known limitation from iteration_43/44. Code review confirms frontend implementation is correct.

PUT /api/profile/email (wrong password).details: Returns 400 with 'Password non corretta' when password is incorrect

PUT /api/profile/email (same email).details: Returns 400 with 'La nuova email è uguale a quella attuale'

PUT /api/profile/email (duplicate email).details: Returns 400 with 'Questa email è già in uso' when email belongs to another user

PUT /api/profile/email (success).details: Successfully changes email and reverts back. Email persisted in profile.

PUT /api/profile/password (wrong current.details: Returns 400 with 'Password attuale non corretta' - BUG FIX VERIFIED

PUT /api/profile/password (success).details: Successfully changes password, login with new password works, old password rejected, reverted. BUG FIX VERIFIED - password now correctly fetched from DB

PUT /api/profile/password (too short).details: Returns 400 with '6 caratteri' when new password < 6 chars

elements: New email input: line 104 - placeholder='Nuova email', data-testid='new-email-input'
Password confirm input: line 105 - placeholder='Conferma con password', data-testid='email-pwd-input'

changeEmail_function.implementation: Correctly calls PUT /profile/email with {new_email, password}, updates user context on success, shows Alert on success/error

critical_code_review_comments: Backend PUT /api/profile/email correctly fetches password from DB (line 1239 in server.py) since get_current_user excludes it
Backend PUT /api/profile/password bug fixed: now fetches password separately from users_col (line 1255 in server.py)
Frontend email change section properly integrated with correct API call and error handling
data-testid attributes correctly added: new-email-input, email-pwd-input, change-email-btn
Email change requires password confirmation for security - matches requirements

success_rate.frontend: CODE VERIFIED (UI automation limited due to RN Web/Playwright compatibility)

seed_data_creation: Tests used existing admin and test_user accounts. All email/password changes were reverted after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email change feature fully implemented and tested. Backend tests confirm all edge cases work correctly. Password change bug fix verified - password is now correctly fetched from DB. Frontend code review confirms UI is implemented with correct data-testid attributes. Playwright has known issues with React Native Web TouchableOpacity - recommend manual testing or native testing approaches for UI verification.
verified_features: 1. Backend: PUT /api/profile/email - success case (change email with correct password) - PASSED
2. Backend: PUT /api/profile/email - wrong password returns 400 - PASSED
3. Backend: PUT /api/profile/email - same email returns 400 - PASSED
4. Backend: PUT /api/profile/email - duplicate email returns 400 - PASSED
5. Backend: PUT /api/profile/email - no auth returns 401 - PASSED
6. Backend: PUT /api/profile/password - verify it still works (bug fix confirmed) - PASSED
7. Frontend: Profile edit page email change section - CODE VERIFIED (UI elements present with correct data-testid attributes)

bug_fix_verification.issue: Password change was failing because get_current_user() excludes password field
bug_fix_verification.fix: Both change_email (line 1239) and change_password (line 1255) now fetch password separately from users_col
